positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a crescent moon nestled within abstract, glowing nebula clouds and surrounded by constellations formed by geometric line work. The style is highly graphic, resembling a modern scientific illustration mixed with ethereal stained glass. Use deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, gold foil accents, and soft cosmic violet for color. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring a strong, clean silhouette of the moon and stars against a dark background. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector-graphic quality, designed for seamless apparel printing.
negative: artifacts, blur, fuzzy, low detail, writing, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, noise, multiple subjects, bad anatomy
